title: Grammarly AI Cheat Sheet
description: Essential tips for using Grammarly AI effectively in everyday writing.

commands.description: Identifies and corrects grammar and spelling mistakes.
commands.scenario: When you want to ensure your document is error-free.

commands.description: Improves sentence clarity and readability.
commands.scenario: When a sentence feels awkward or unclear.

commands.description: Provides alternative words to enhance vocabulary.
commands.scenario: When you want to avoid repetition or find a better word.

commands.description: Condenses a paragraph into a concise summary.
commands.scenario: When you need a quick overview of a long text.

commands.description: Analyzes and provides feedback on the tone of your writing.
commands.scenario: When you want to ensure the tone matches your intent.

commands.description: Adjusts the text to a more formal tone.
commands.scenario: When an email or document sounds too casual.

commands.description: Reduces wordiness to make text more concise.
commands.scenario: When a passage is too long-winded.

commands.description: Breaks down a complex sentence for better understanding.
commands.scenario: When a sentence is too complicated to grasp.

commands.description: Translates text into another language.
commands.scenario: When you need to communicate with someone in a different language.

commands.description: Scans the text for potential plagiarism issues.
commands.scenario: When you want to ensure content originality.

commands.description: Generates a citation for a reference.
commands.scenario: When you need to cite a source in your writing.

commands.description: Customizes suggestions based on your writing style.
commands.scenario: When you want feedback tailored to your preferences.

commands.description: Allows setting specific goals for writing style and tone.
commands.scenario: When you want to define the purpose and audience of your text.

commands.description: Provides a detailed report on writing performance.
commands.scenario: When you want an overview of your writing strengths and weaknesses.

commands.command: Convert this list into a professional bulleted format
commands.description: Transforms messy or unorganized notes into structured, easy-to-read bullet points.

commands.command: Draft a response to this email based on these key points
commands.description: Uses brief notes or context to generate a complete, polite email reply.

commands.command: Rewrite this to sound more empathetic and supportive
commands.description: Adjusts the emotional intelligence of the text, ideal for sensitive customer service or interpersonal messages.

commands.command: Create an engaging headline/subject line for this text
commands.description: Generates catchy or professional titles and email subject lines to increase open rates.

commands.command: Identify the main call to action in this text
commands.description: Analyzes the writing to find the primary instruction or request being made to the reader.
Instruct the AI to simplify or elevate the vocabulary to match a specific audience, such as '5th graders' or 'executive leadership'.

commands.command: Expand this point into a full paragraph
commands.description: Use a brief bullet point or thought to generate a cohesive, well-structured paragraph while maintaining the existing context.

commands.command: Change the perspective to [First Person/Third Person]
commands.description: Rewrite a passage to shift the narrative voice, such as changing 'The team completed the task' to 'We completed the task'.

commands.command: Extract key action items from this meeting transcript
commands.description: Paste raw notes or a transcript to have the AI identify specific tasks, owners, and deadlines.

commands.command: Remove passive voice and make it more direct
commands.description: Specifically target passive sentence structures to make the writing more authoritative and energetic.
